description_long: This house features a light-colored exterior with a combination of gable and hip roofs, giving it a classic suburban appearance. The front includes a paved driveway, a small lawn with two trees, and a main entryway with a single door and a row of windows. Along the sides, multiple large windows are symmetrically arranged, and the rear of the house opens to a fenced patio area with outdoor seating and greenery. The roof is predominantly green, suggesting either a green roof or stylized representation. The structure appears to be a single-story building with a spacious footprint, suitable for a family residence. Decorative shrubs and a well-maintained lawn enhance the curb appeal.
description: A single-story suburban house with a light exterior, gable and hip roofs, a driveway, and a fenced backyard patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entry door, two trees, and a row of windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the symmetrical arrangement of large windows and the driveway extending to the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced patio area, outdoor seating, and a decorative trellis above the back door.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more windows, a single tree, and a clear view of the backyard fence.
attribute_entryway_design: Single front door with a paved driveway, small porch, and decorative shrubs.
